---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# probitdata

<!-- badges: start -->
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/loelschlaeger/probitdata/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/loelschlaeger/probitdata/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![CRAN status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/probitdata)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=probitdata)
[![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/loelschlaeger/probitdata/branch/master/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/loelschlaeger/probitdata?branch=master)
<!-- badges: end -->

The `{probitdata}` R package can simulate data from a probit model.

## Installation

You can install the development version of probitdata from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("loelschlaeger/probitdata")
```

## Example

TBN
